steps.t: Lothíriel can be found in the Great Hall of the Prince in Dol Amroth. You have been summoned to Dol Amroth by Lothíriel, who seeks your aid once more.
Ethring can be found in the Ringló Vale to the south-east of Lamedon. Lothíriel has asked you to travel into Central Gondor and aid the people of Ring…
